overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage showing a flying vehicle taking off from an industrial outskirts area and navigating through a dense, neon-lit futuristic metropolis at night. The perspective shifts from third-person to immersive first-person cockpit view as the car ascends into the urban canyon between towering skyscrapers covered in holographic advertisements.

events.description: vehicle lifts off from ground and begins ascending into the air
camera switches from third-person to first-person cockpit view

agents.ego_description: vehicle accelerates and takes off from the industrial ground area near other parked cars

notable_agents.action: group of people standing near the parked SUV observing the area
dark SUV parked on the asphalt near the fence

entered.detail: tall vertical green laser beam cutting through the night sky above the industrial area
chain-link fence with industrial scaffolding and structures behind it
dark sport utility vehicle parked on the asphalt near the group of people
illuminated futuristic skyline visible in the distance beyond the industrial zone

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a dark industrial outskirts area at night, with a flying car positioned on asphalt near a parked SUV and a small group of NPCs. A prominent green laser beam cuts through the sky in the distance. The vehicle accelerates and takes off from the ground, transitioning from third-person to cockpit view as it begins its ascent.

events.description: passing over industrial wasteland and approaching dense urban skyline
flying past illuminated geodesic pyramid structure and entering urban airspace

agents.ego_description: flying vehicle ascending rapidly while approaching the city skyline from the outskirts

entered.detail: futuristic vehicle dashboard with green ambient lighting and holographic control displays
large illuminated pyramid-shaped structure with triangular metal framework
elevated roadway structure with street lighting running parallel to flight path

segments.scene_description: From the first-person cockpit perspective, the vehicle ascends over the industrial wasteland toward the glowing city skyline. The interior dashboard displays green holographic readouts. A distinctive geodesic pyramid structure passes by as the vehicle gains altitude, leaving the industrial fence and parked vehicles behind while the green laser beam shifts to the left of the frame.

events.description: entering dense skyscraper canyon with buildings on both sides
banking right to navigate between closely spaced glass towers

agents.ego_description: navigating flying car through narrow gaps between towering skyscrapers at high speed

entered.detail: tall glass building with illuminated windows and neon accents passing by closely
large floating digital advertisement with colorful animated display
multi-level roadway system with moving vehicle lights visible below

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a dense urban canyon, weaving between massive skyscrapers adorned with neon lighting. The cockpit view shows the dashboard as the car banks sharply to navigate the narrow gaps between glass towers. Holographic billboards float alongside the buildings, and the elevated highway system becomes visible in the distance below.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial district with dense signage

events.description: entering district with heavy Japanese neon signage and holographic advertisements
sharp bank turn around building corner near red torii-like structure

agents.ego_description: maneuvering through dense neon signage and tight urban corridors with heavy Japanese architectural elements

entered.detail: tall building facade with red Japanese characters and blue neon hotel signage
skyscraper completely covered in large digital billboards showing animated characters
traditional Japanese gate structure with red illumination integrated into modern architecture

segments.scene_description: The vehicle flies through a dense commercial district characterized by heavy Japanese neon signage and massive holographic advertisements covering the buildings. The cockpit view reveals detailed dashboard readouts as the car banks sharply around a corner near a red torii-like structure. The urban canyon becomes increasingly narrow with vibrant pink, blue, and red neon lights illuminating the scene from all sides.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that begins in a dark industrial wasteland and ascends into the vibrant, neon-drenched canyons of a futuristic metropolis. It begins on a dark asphalt lot near a group of people and a parked SUV, accelerating upward as the perspective shifts from a third-person view to an immersive cockpit filled with green holographic readouts. As the vehicle gains altitude, the industrial fences and a distant green laser beam recede, giving way to a glowing city skyline and a passing geodesic pyramid. The scene then shifts into a dense urban canyon, where the car banks sharply between glass skyscrapers and floating billboards while an elevated highway system unfolds below. Finally, the flight pushes deeper into a commercial district, weaving past red torii-like structures and massive Japanese holographic advertisements under a saturated canopy of pink, blue, and red neon lights.
